📊 Activate Your Broker Account

Chapter 2 of 8 · Day Trading → Stocks ⏱ ~20 min 🔗 Tool Activation Required 💰 Earns you commissions

📖 Why Your Broker Choice Matters

Your broker is your gateway to the markets. The right one gives you fast execution, reliable charts, paper trading to practice for free, and zero-commission trades. The wrong one costs you money on every single trade.

We recommend setting up two accounts: one for active day trading and one for charting and analysis. This is exactly what professional traders do.

🏦 The Two Accounts You Need

Account 1 — Webull (Your Trading Account): Zero-commission trades, extended hours trading, fractional shares, and a powerful built-in screener. Available on desktop and mobile.

Account 2 — TD Ameritrade / Thinkorswim: The most powerful free charting platform on earth. Used by professional traders every day. Unlimited paper trading lets you practice with fake money before going live.

Action Required — Activate Your Tools

Click each link below to open your accounts. You earn commissions when your referrals do the same.

📊Open Webull — Free Trading AccountYou earn $$ when they fund 📉Open TD Ameritrade / ThinkorswimFree paper trading platform 📈Join TradingView — Chart Like a ProYou earn 30% recurring commission

Open all three links, sign up, and check them off. This unlocks Chapter 3.

💡 Pro Tip — Fund Your Account Smart

You do not need a lot of money to start. Most brokers let you open an account with as little as $1. Start with paper trading on Thinkorswim until you finish this course.

When ready to fund your live account, start with an amount you are completely okay losing — many successful traders started with $500–$1,000.

🔑 What Is Wholesaling & How You Get Paid

Chapter 1 of 7 · Real Estate → Wholesaling ⏱ ~25 min 📝 Analysis Required

📖 What Is Wholesaling?

Wholesaling is a real estate investing strategy where you find deeply discounted properties, put them under contract, and then sell that contract to another investor — all without ever actually buying the house. Your profit is the difference between the price you locked in and the price the end buyer pays.

A typical wholesale fee is $5,000 to $20,000 per deal, and the best part — you can close deals in 2–4 weeks with zero money out of pocket (if structured correctly).

🔄 The 3-Step Wholesale Process

Step 1 — Find a Motivated Seller: Look for people who need to sell fast — pre-foreclosures, probate, divorce, inherited property, landlords tired of tenants. These sellers are willing to discount their price for a quick, cash close.

Step 2 — Lock It Up Under Contract: Use a purchase and sale agreement to lock in a below-market price with an assignment clause. You are not buying the house — you are buying the right to buy it.

Step 3 — Assign to a Cash Buyer: Market the deal to your investor buyers list. They pay you an assignment fee and take over the contract. You collect at closing — no mortgage, no renovation, no landlord duties.

🧮 The MAO Formula — Never Overpay

Before you make any offer, you must run the MAO formula. This is what separates professional wholesalers from beginners who lose money.

MAO = Maximum Allowable Offer

MAO = (ARV × 70%) − Repair Costs − Wholesale Fee
ARV = After Repair Value (what the house is worth fixed up)
70% = Standard investor rule — leaves room for profit + costs
Repair Costs = Your estimate of what it costs to renovate
Wholesale Fee = Your profit (typically $5k–$20k)

Example: ARV = $200k · Repairs = $30k · Your fee = $10k
MAO = ($200k × 70%) − $30k − $10k = $100,000 max offer

🔧 Your Action Tool — PropStream

PropStream is the #1 tool wholesalers use to find motivated sellers, pull comparable sales (comps), and run skip tracing to find owner contact info. Sign up through the link below — it gives you a 7-day free trial and you earn a recurring commission every month your referrals stay subscribed.

Action Required — Run Your First Analysis

Use PropStream to look up a property in your area and practice running the MAO formula.

🏠Start PropStream Free TrialYou earn recurring monthly commissions

💡 Dr. Gainz Pro Tip

Your first deal should be within 30 miles of where you live. Use PropStream to find the comps and send your first 50 direct mail pieces within your first 7 days. Speed is your competitive advantage.

📦 What Is Dropshipping & How to Start

Chapter 1 of 6 · E-Commerce → Dropshipping⏱ ~20 min

📖 What Is Dropshipping?

Dropshipping is an e-commerce model where you sell products online without holding any inventory. When a customer places an order in your store, you purchase the item from a supplier who ships it directly to your customer. You keep the profit margin.

The business model is powerful because your startup costs are extremely low — you only pay for products after you make a sale. Successful dropshippers can run $10,000–$100,000+/month stores from a laptop anywhere in the world.

🏪 Your Store — Shopify

Shopify is the world's leading e-commerce platform and the best choice for dropshippers. It integrates directly with supplier apps like DSers and AutoDS, gives you a professional storefront in minutes, and processes payments from day one. Plans start at $39/month.

🔍 Finding Winning Products

The biggest mistake beginners make is picking products they personally like instead of products the market is buying. Use data tools like Helium 10 and Facebook Ad Library to find products with proven demand.

Look for: high perceived value, solves a specific problem, not easily found in local stores, retail price of $30–$150 (gives you $10–$50 margin after supplier cost + ads).

Action Required — Launch Your Store

Click below to start your Shopify free trial and explore your first supplier.

🛒Start Shopify Free TrialYou earn $58–$2,000 per referral 🔬Try Helium 10 — Product ResearchYou earn recurring commissions

💡 Dr. Gainz Pro Tip

Don't spend a month building the perfect store before you make a sale. Launch with 5 products in 48 hours, run a small $10/day Facebook or TikTok ad, and let the market tell you what's working. Then double down.
